Holy Saraswati Puja Celebration 2025

This year Holy Saraswati Puja Celebration is going to be held on 2nd February(Sunday) at Morishita Cultural Center , Koto-ku, Japan. We cordially invite you to attend the festival with your family and friends.

----------------------------------

সুধী, আগামী ২রা ফেব্রুয়ারি, ২০২৫ (রবিবার) টোকিওর মোরিশিতা কালচারাল সেন্টারে শ্রী শ্রী সরস্বতী পূজার আয়োজন করা হইয়াছে। আয়োজিত এই মহোৎসবে আপনাদের সবান্ধব উপস্থিতি ও আন্তরিক সহযোগিতা আমাদের একান্ত কাম্য।

----------------------------------

この度、2025年2月2 日(日曜日)にインドのベンガル文化協会によるサラスワティプジャが東京都江東区の森下文化センサーで開催致します。皆様方のご参加を心よりお待ちしております

----------------------------------

Scheduleスケジュール

11:00 ~ Puja　[プジャ]

12:00~ Guest reception [ゲストスピーチ]

13:00 ~ 13:30 Worship (Anjali) [一般参詣]

13:00 ~ 15:00 Prasaad (Lunch) [お食事]

15:00 ~ 17:00 Cultural Program　

　　　　　　

[文化プログラムと]

----------------------------------

Entry fees :</p>

Above 12years old :

3000¥ with Veg Lunch

2000¥ without lunch

Below 12years old:

1200¥ with Veg Lunch

0¥ without lunch

----------------------------------

For any queries, please feel free to reach us at

Email: info@ibcaj.org

Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/share/15nimcQbKd/?mibextid=wwXIfr

Thanking You,

IBCAJ Team

IBCAJ Event Calendar 2023 - 2024

Nababarsho Celebration - April_22(Sat)

Rabindra Jayanti Celebration - May_28(Sun)

Independence Day Celebration - Aug_19(Sat)

Classical-music Event - September_3(Sun)

Durgapuja Celebration - October_22(Sun)-23(Mon)

Saraswati Puja Celebration - February_12(Mon)/ 17(Sat)/ 18(Sun) (tentative)

Holi/Dol utsab Celebration - March_23rd(Sat)/24th(Sun) (tentative)

About Us

About Our Organization

Read more

The India (Bengal) Cultural Association Japan (IBCA Japan) was established with the sole purpose of increasing cultural exchange between India and Japan. At the turn of the 10th year, since our foundation with a humble Saraswati Puja in 2011, we proudly claim that we are not merely limited to cultural exchange between the two countries but have gone far beyond that threshold through our efforts of increasing social and economic collaboration as well as embracing other Indian communities within our wing.

Follow us on Facebook

Follow

Saraswati Puja Celebration

This year we celebrated Holy Saraswati Puja on 21st February (Sunday) with only members access due to Covid-19 pandemic. During our celebration we followed the rules and regulations set by the Government of Japan and by the community Hall management. Some glimpses from our celebration.!

Happy 72nd Republic Day

26th January has been celebrated every year to honour the date on which the constitution of India came into effect. Our heartfelt respect to all who fought for our freedom and shaped our country to be a Sovereign, Socialist, Secular & democratic republic with the adoption of constitution.!

Durga Puja 2021

Here are some glimpses from our Durga Puja celebration on 2021.

estrela-bet
пин-ап узбекистан

Our organization India(Bengal) Cultural Association Japan (IBCA Japan) was established to increase cultural exchange between India and Japan. It was founded by some bengali people living in Japan and started its journey with Holy Saraswati Puja.
